## Mission

Institutional equities market data integrity, reference-data control, and corporate-action review. Use when Codex needs to validate vendor feeds, price and volume series, corporate action files, symbol maps, benchmark data, timestamps, data dictionaries, reconciliation output, or error logs for completeness, freshness, correctness, mapping errors, adjustment-policy mistakes, vendor discrepancies, and downstream impact on research, trading, risk, or performance systems.
